stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true in an aircraft with Fly-By-Wire flight controls equipped with both soft and hard protections?

options.a: Hard protections increases the force required to move the control stick.
options.b: Soft protections prevent the pilot from exceeding critical flight parameters.
options.c: Soft protections increase the force required to move the control stick.
options.d: Hard protections allow the pilot to override the limits.
